rationale: Section 46.007 governs refunding bond mechanics—maturity, call dates, present value savings. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised values, or revenue thresholds that the proposed exemption increase would implicate.
quote: A school district may use state funds received under this subchapter to pay the principal of and interest on refunding bonds that:
_note: No direct conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district bonding capacity is possible but not addressed by this statute's operative text.
